source: on-pattern batch + sourced via retuned YouTube search (source_prospects.py)
note: All female-led / personal, nano-micro travel, posted within 8 months. ★ = fresh lead to action; others are your reference examples.

prospects.name: sheisthelostgirl (Beth)
